stdout:
{
  "asset_kind": "session",
  "bundle_id": "bundle-codex-session",
  "source_tool": "codex",
  "source_session_id": "codex-session",
  "target_tool": "gemini",
  "output_dir": "$TMP/out",
  "files": [
    "GEMINI.sessionport.md",
    "SETTINGS_PATCH.json",
    "STARTER_PROMPT.md",
    "manifest.json"
  ],
  "partial_fields": [
    "raw_transcript",
    "resume_hints",
    "settings_snapshot",
    "token_stats",
    "tool_events",
    "tool_outputs",
    "touched_files"
  ],
  "unsupported_fields": [
    "hidden_reasoning",
    "native_hook_plugin_state",
    "vendor_specific_options"
  ],
  "redacted_fields": [
    "settings.auth_token",
    "settings.experimental"
  ],
  "warnings": [
    "2 settings keys remain redacted in portability output.",
    "Gemini export will emit a settings patch suggestion rather than replacing the full local profile.",
    "Source-native resume hints are carried as plain notes only and do not recreate native resume state."
  ]
}
